E001.title: Bridge not ready
E001.description: The Python bridge server has not started yet. Wait for '● Bridge' indicator in the status bar.
E001.action: Wait for the bridge to start, or check Edit > Preferences > Python Bridge.

E002.title: Bridge endpoint not found (404)
E002.description: The installed bridge plugin is outdated and missing this endpoint.
E002.action: Run _plugins_setup.bat to reinstall the bridge plugin, then restart the app.

E003.title: File not found
E003.description: The ontology file could not be found at the specified path.
E003.action: Check the file path in Edit > Preferences > Paths, or use File > Open.

E004.title: Parse error
E004.description: The ontology file could not be parsed. It may be malformed JSON-LD.
E004.action: Validate the file with a JSON linter or SHACL validator.

E005.title: Ontology root not set
E005.description: The ontology root directory has not been configured.
E005.action: Set 'Ontology Root Path' in Edit > Preferences > Paths.

E006.title: Double ontology path
E006.description: The ontology root path already contains '/ontology' — the app attempted to append it again.
E006.action: Set 'Ontology Root Path' to the tscg/ repo root, not the ontology/ subfolder.

E007.title: SPARQL query error
E007.description: The SPARQL query could not be executed on the loaded ontology.
E007.action: Check the query syntax and ensure the ontology is loaded.

E008.title: SHACL validation failed
E008.description: The ontology does not conform to the TSCG SHACL schema.
E008.action: Review the validation report and correct the ontology before saving.

E009.title: Plugin load failed
E009.description: A plugin could not be loaded. It may have a syntax error or missing dependency.
E009.action: Check the plugin's index.js for errors, or reinstall via Tools > Install Plugin.
